name: Sunita Dulal
profileSummary:
Sunita Dulal is a prominent Nepalese folk singer from Kathmandu, Nepal. She has been singing Nepali folk, festive to modern songs for the last ten years. Sunita Dulal is a multitalented young Nepali woman. In addition to singing, Sunita Dulal also does acting, presents program on NTV, and modeling as well. Recently, she has released her 13th album Mero Hajur on market which reflects to be another super hit Nepalese Teej Festive album of her. Teej festival normally falls from late July to early September. Sunita Dulal has now released her this year's Teej Album Nachau Sarara; which is her 15th album including songs 'Teej Ko Ayo Lahara' and 'Chuppa Moi Khaula'.
She also participated in Melancholy, an environmental song by 365 Nepalese artists in which break Guinness World Record entitled "Most Vocal Solos in a Song Recording" is written, music composed and directed by Nipesh DHAKA. On 19 May 2016, Dulal recorded her solo part with her group at Radio Nepal studio and officially released on 2 September 2017 by president Bidya Devi Bhandari at Army Officer's Club, Kathmandu.
